title: Add Meshtastic protobuf schema/codegen strategy for Zephyr
description: Why this exists: the Meshtastic app protocol is protobuf-based and the Zephyr adapter needs a maintainable no-dynamic-allocation decode/encode path. What needs to be done: choose a schema source and generated-code strategy suitable for Zephyr C, likely nanopb or an equivalent bounded codec; include only MVP messages; document schema version/commit; add build integration and size checks. Acceptance criteria: generated or checked-in codec builds for native_sim and r1_neo/nrf52840 gateway; decode rejects oversized/malformed frames safely; encode supports MVP FromRadio responses; schema provenance is recorded; code review confirms no unbounded allocations or unsafe parser assumptions.
notes: 2026-06-30 implementation evidence: added bounded Zephyr Meshtastic codec under lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic with schema provenance commit 032b7dfd68e875c4323e6ac67590c6fc616b1714; supports bounded ToRadio decode for packet, want_config_id, disconnect, heartbeat; supports FromRadio config_complete, queueStatus, packet, and raw length-delimited sync response wrappers for my_info, node_info, config, moduleConfig, channel, metadata, clientNotification(field 16), region_presets. No dynamic allocation; public encoders preflight final encoded size before writing caller buffers. App-level gateway feature fragment added at lichen/apps/gateway/meshtastic_compat.conf; CI native_sim Twister and R1 gateway EXTRA_CONF_FILE wiring added. EC2 post-fix verification: west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_codec -p native_sim --inline-logs PASS, 1 scenario / 11 test cases. R1 gateway build PASS: west build -b r1_neo/nrf52840 -d /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/build-r1-neo-gateway-meshtastic-final lichen/apps/gateway --pristine=always -- -DEXTRA_CONF_FILE=meshtastic_compat.conf. Generated config evidence: CONFIG_LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_CODEC=y, MAX_TO_RADIO=504, MAX_FROM_RADIO=510, CONFIG_LICHEN_IPV6=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_L2=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_L2=y. Devicetree evidence: zephyr,lora = &lora0; alias lora0 = &lora0; lora0: lora@0. Memory: FLASH 243172 B / 1 MB (23.19%), RAM 73092 B / 256 KB (27.88%); arm size text 237240 data 5920 bss 67530 dec 310690. Review evidence: Plato PASS no blocking findings; Noether PASS no blocking findings; Russell reported R1 lora0 failure, contradicted by post-review EC2 build/devicetree evidence and treated as false positive; Maxwell found P1 wrong clientNotification field 14 vs schema field 16, fixed and re-reviewed PASS.
close_reason: Completed: bounded Zephyr Meshtastic codec, schema provenance, app-level gateway feature fragment, CI/native_sim tests, R1 gateway build, and three post-change review passes recorded.
